title: morisonia atamisquea
intro: Morisonia atamisquea, also known as yellow chamomile, is a plant species native to the Andean regions of South America, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used traditionally to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Morisonia atamisquea is also said to have antioxidant and antiviral properties, which may help to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
